title: Our New Branch Is Now Open
summary: Heritage Cuts has opened a new branch to serve more customers across Toronto.
content: The new Heritage Cuts branch is now open and welcoming customers. The location offers the same professional haircuts, beard grooming, and traditional barbering services available at our original shop.

title: Special Offer for Students
summary: Students can now receive special pricing on selected services at Heritage Cuts.
content: Students can visit Heritage Cuts and present a valid student identification card to receive special pricing on selected haircuts and grooming services. Contact the shop for more information about the offer.

title: New Extended Business Hours
summary: Heritage Cuts is now open from 9:00 a.m. until 8:00 p.m.
content: Our previous operating hours were from 10:00 a.m. to 4:00 p.m. The new extended hours of 9:00 a.m. to 8:00 p.m. give customers more time to visit the shop and schedule their grooming services.
